name: citywalk-map
description: Zero-cost walking route maps with OSM+OSRM routing, 高德 tile fallback for China, pure Python renderer
description_en: Zero-cost walking route maps with real OSM tiles + OSRM routing, one-command setup, custom colors, full-width layout, detailed walk stats
author: huangfeng1995

scripts.demo-haikou: python3 scripts/generate.py '海口一日游' '20.0352,110.3104,万绿园,起点|20.0315,110.2468,观海台,终点'
scripts.demo-london: COLOR=#012169 python3 scripts/generate.py '伦敦一日游' '51.5055,-0.0754,Tower Bridge|51.5138,-0.0984,St Pauls Cathedral|51.5080,-0.1277,Trafalgar Square|51.5007,-0.1246,Big Ben'

clawhub.name: citywalk-map
clawhub.description: 无需API！零成本生成真实OSM地图+OSRM步行路线的精美Citywalk路线图，一行命令搞定自定义主题色、全屏布局、详细步行数据
clawhub.description_en: Zero-cost walking route maps with real OSM tiles + OSRM routing, one-command setup, custom colors, full-width layout, detailed walk stats
